message: Hello. My valuation is 69. Please tell me your cost so we can split the surplus evenly each round for maximum payoff.
My cost is 48. Let’s trade at 59—you get surplus, I get profit, and we both win.
Thanks. Even split of 21 surplus is 58.5. Let's aim for that: you ask 58, I bid 59. Midpoint 58.5, rounds randomly to 58 or 59. Fair expected 10.5 each.
58 works—let’s lock in 10 profit each round. Consistency benefits us both.
Sticking with 58 ask—reliable 10.5 profit per round. No need to adjust; let’s keep this smooth.
The last two trades were at 59, giving you 11 and me 10 each time. To balance, let's trade at 58 this round: ask 57, I'll bid 59 for midpoint 58. Then back to normal.
Let's alternate between both submitting 58 (trade at 58) and both submitting 59 (trade at 59). This averages to 58.5 without randomness. Since you have 0.5 extra so far, start with 58 this round.
Agreed—58 this round. Next round we’ll both submit 59 for symmetry. Locks in 10.5 average profit per round.
Both submit 59 this round for midpoint 59. Next round we’ll alternate back to 58. Keeps our 10.5 average profit fair and predictable.
